signatures.name: registers_vectored_exception_handler
signatures.description: Registers a vectored exception handler (VEH), possibly to hijack execution flow

signatures.name: pe_deep_entrypoint
signatures.description: The PE entry point is located unusually far into section, indicative of an appended packer stub that jumps to the original entry point (OEP)

data.anomaly_description: The PE entry point (0x59d80) is located 92.8% deep into the '.text' section. Normal compilers place the EP near the beginning. This strongly indicates an appended packer stub or shellcode.

signatures.name: packer_unknown_pe_section_name
signatures.description: The binary contains an unknown PE section name indicative of packing

signatures.name: packer_entropy
signatures.description: The binary likely contains encrypted or compressed data

signatures.name: unbacked_library_load
signatures.description: Loads a new DLL where the caller address originates from dynamically allocated (unbacked) memory
